name: chat
description: Feature-object chat surface and standalone chatroom demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, who) rxd { return { text: text, actor: who }; }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
LambdaCore-shaped room base. Rooms are spaces with contents, present actors, exit-object lookup, room-authored look output, and announce/tell fanout helpers.

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description }; }

verbs.name: announce
verbs.source: verb :announce(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([actor], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all
verbs.source: verb :announce_all(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all_but
verbs.source: verb :announce_all_but(ignore, text) rxd { for listener in this.subscribers { if (!(listener in ignore)) { tell(listener, text); } } return true; }

verbs.name: match_exit
verbs.source: verb :match_exit(name) rxd { let exits = this.exits; if (name in exits) { return exits[name]; } return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: enterfunc
verbs.source: verb :enterfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: exitfunc
verbs.source: verb :exitfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: north
verbs.source: verb :north() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("north"); }

verbs.name: northeast
verbs.source: verb :northeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northeast"); }

verbs.name: east
verbs.source: verb :east() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("east"); }

verbs.name: southeast
verbs.source: verb :southeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southeast"); }

verbs.name: south
verbs.source: verb :south() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("south"); }

verbs.name: southwest
verbs.source: verb :southwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southwest"); }

verbs.name: west
verbs.source: verb :west() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("west"); }

verbs.name: northwest
verbs.source: verb :northwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northwest"); }

verbs.name: out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("out"); }

verbs.name: go
verbs.source: verb :go(exit) rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let exit_obj = this:match_exit(exit); if (exit_obj == $failed_match) { let msg = "You can't go that way (" + exit + ")."; tell(actor, msg); return msg; } return exit_obj:invoke(); }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(object) rxd { raise { code: "E_UNSUPPORTED", message: "room take requires the trusted local room handler" }; }

verbs.name: drop
verbs.source: verb :drop(object) rxd { raise { code: "E_UNSUPPORTED", message: "room drop requires the trusted local room handler" }; }

classes.description: First-class room exit. Exits live in their source room's anchor cluster, carry aliases and movement messages, and invoke the LambdaCore-style moveto path.

verbs.name: invoke
verbs.source: verb :invoke() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:move(actor); }

verbs.name: move
verbs.source: verb :move(who) rxd { if (who != actor) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "exits only move the invoking actor", value: who }; } let source = this.source; let dest = this.dest; if (this.nogo_msg) { tell(who, this.nogo_msg); if (this.onogo_msg) { source:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + this.onogo_msg); } return this.nogo_msg; } if (!dest) { let msg = "You can't go that way."; tell(who, msg); return msg; } if (this.leave_msg) { tell(who, this.leave_msg); } moveto(who, dest); set_presence(source, false); set_presence(dest, true); let left_text = who.name + " " + this.oleave_msg; observe_to_space(source, { type: "left", actor: who, room: source, destination: dest, exit: this.name, text: left_text, ts: now() }); if (this.arrive_msg) { tell(who, this.arrive_msg); } let entered_text = who.name + " " + this.oarrive_msg; observe_to_space(dest, { type: "entered", actor: who, room: dest, origin: source, exit: this.name, text: entered_text, ts: now() }); return { room: dest, from: source, exit: this.name, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: announce_msg
verbs.source: verb :announce_msg(place, who, text) rxd { return place:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + text); }

classes.description: Standalone chat room class. Conversational behavior comes from $conversational; inherited $room verbs provide exit-object movement and carryable object movement.
Carryable room object. Instances can move between room contents and actor inventory without changing host placement.
Fixed room furnishing. It appears in room look output but is not carryable.

A talkative bird. Cheap imitation of the LambdaMOO cockatoo (#1479): squawks random phrases, can be taught new ones, gagged when too noisy. Self-driven timer chatter is deferred until DSL exposes fork; for now squawking is actor-driven.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { let suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece"; if (this.gagged) { suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece, gagged"; } return this.name + ", a sulphur-crested cockatoo " + suffix; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let state = this.mood; if (this.gagged) { state = "gagged"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_seen", source: this, actor: actor, mood: state, ts: now() }); return { description: this.description, mood: state, phrase_count: length(this.phrases) }; }

verbs.name: squawk
verbs.source: verb :squawk() rxd { if (this.gagged) { observe({ type: "cockatoo_muffled", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return "*muffled noises*"; } let phrases = this.phrases; if (length(phrases) == 0) { return ""; } let phrase = phrases[random(length(phrases)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_squawk", source: this, actor: actor, text: phrase, ts: now() }); return phrase; }

verbs.name: teach
verbs.source: verb :teach(phrase) rx { if (typeof(phrase) != "string") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "teach requires a string phrase", value: phrase }; } if (!phrase) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "teach requires a non-empty phrase" }; } this.phrases = this.phrases + [phrase]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_taught", source: this, actor: actor, phrase: phrase, ts: now() }); return length(this.phrases); }

verbs.name: pluck
verbs.source: verb :pluck() rxd { observe({ type: "cockatoo_pluck", source: this, actor: actor, text: "*EEEEEEK!*", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: shake
verbs.source: verb :shake() rxd { let reactions = this.shake_reactions; if (length(reactions) == 0) { return ""; } let reaction = reactions[random(length(reactions)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_shake", source: this, actor: actor, reaction: reaction, ts: now() }); return reaction; }

verbs.name: feed
verbs.source: verb :feed(food) rxd { let snack = food; if (!snack) { snack = "birdseed"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_fed", source: this, actor: actor, food: snack, ts: now() }); return snack; }

verbs.name: gag
verbs.source: verb :gag() rx { this.gagged = true; observe({ type: "cockatoo_gagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: ungag
verbs.source: verb :ungag() rx { this.gagged = false; observe({ type: "cockatoo_ungagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: can_be_attached_by
verbs.source: verb :can_be_attached_by(who) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_to
verbs.source: verb :say_to(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_to requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_to", actor: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_as
verbs.source: verb :say_as(style, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_as requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_as", actor: actor, style: style, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "emote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: pose
verbs.source: verb :pose(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "pose requires text" }; } observe({ type: "posed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: quote
verbs.source: verb :quote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "quote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "quoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: self
verbs.source: verb :self(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "self requires text" }; } observe({ type: "self_pointed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "tell requires text" }; } observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { return this:look_self(); }

verbs.name: who
verbs.source: verb :who() rxd { observe({ type: "who", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, text: "Present.", ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let old = location(actor); if (old != null && old != this && old in actor.presence_in) { set_presence(old, false); observe_to_space(old, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: old, destination: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); } moveto(actor, this); set_presence(this, true); observe_to_space(this, { type: "entered", actor: actor, room: this, origin: old, text: actor.name + " entered.", ts: now() }); return { room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { set_presence(this, false); moveto(actor, actor.home); observe_to_space(this, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: huh
verbs.source: verb :huh(text, reason) rxd { observe({ type: "huh", actor: actor, text: text, reason: reason, ts: now() }); return false; }

verbs.name: huh_plan
verbs.source: verb :huh_plan(text, reason) rxd { this:huh(text, reason); return { ok: false, route: "huh", target: this, verb: "huh", args: [text, reason], error: reason, text: text }; }

verbs.name: directed_plan
verbs.source: verb :directed_plan(rest, verb_name, original) rxd { rest = str_trim(rest); let cmd = $match:parse_command(verb_name + " " + rest, actor, this); let target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; let directed_text = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; if (target == null || !directed_text) { return this:huh_plan(original, "Directed speech needs a recipient and text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: verb_name, args: [target, directed_text], cmd: cmd }; }

verbs.name: object_command_plan
verbs.source: verb :object_command_plan(cmd, original) rxd { let target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; if (target == null) { return null; } let matched = $match:match_verb(cmd["verb"], target); if (typeof(matched) != "map") { return this:huh_plan(original, to_string(target) + " does not understand " + cmd["verb"] + "."); } let route = "direct"; let plan_space = null; if (!matched["direct_callable"]) { route = "sequenced"; plan_space = this; } let call_args = []; let rest = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; if (rest) { call_args = [rest]; } return { ok: true, route: route, space: plan_space, target: target, verb: matched["name"], args: call_args, cmd: cmd }; }

verbs.name: command_plan
verbs.source: verb :command_plan(input) rxd { let text = str_trim(input); if (!text) { return this:huh_plan(input, "empty command"); } if (str_starts(text, "/me ")) { let emote_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 5)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "emote", args: [emote_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("emote " + emote_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, ":") && length(text) > 1) { let colon_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "emote", args: [colon_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("emote " + colon_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "]") && length(text) > 1) { let pose_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "pose", args: [pose_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("pose " + pose_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "|") && length(text) > 1) { let quote_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "quote", args: [quote_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("quote " + quote_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "<") && length(text) > 1) { let self_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "self", args: [self_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("self " + self_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, str_char(34)) && length(text) > 1) { let say_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [say_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("say " + say_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "`") && length(text) > 1) { return this:directed_plan(str_slice(text, 2), "say_to", text); } if (str_starts(text, "[")) { let close = str_index(text, "]"); if (close > 2) { let style = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2, close - 1)); let styled_text = str_trim(str_slice(text, close + 1)); if (str_starts(styled_text, ":")) { styled_text = str_trim(str_slice(styled_text, 2)); } if (!style || !styled_text) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Styled speech needs a style and text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say_as", args: [style, styled_text], cmd: $match:parse_command("say_as " + styled_text, actor, this) }; } } if (str_starts(str_lower(text), "/tell ")) { return this:directed_plan(str_slice(text, 7), "tell", text); } let cmd = $match:parse_command(text, actor, this); let verb_name = str_lower(cmd["verb"]); let argstr = cmd["argstr"]; if (verb_name == "say") { if (!argstr) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Say what?"); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "emote" || verb_name == "pose") { if (!argstr) { return this:huh_plan(text, verb_name + " needs text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: verb_name, args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "tell" || verb_name == "whisper" || verb_name == "page") { return this:directed_plan(argstr, "tell", text); } let room_verb = $match:match_verb(cmd["verb"], this); if (typeof(room_verb) == "map" && room_verb["direct_callable"] && !argstr) { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: room_verb["name"], args: [], cmd: cmd }; } if (typeof(room_verb) == "map" && room_verb["direct_callable"] && argstr && room_verb["definer"] != null && isa(this, room_verb["definer"])) { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: room_verb["name"], args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } let object_plan = this:object_command_plan(cmd, text); if (object_plan != null) { return object_plan; } if (typeof(room_verb) == "map" && room_verb["direct_callable"]) { let room_args = []; if (argstr) { room_args = [argstr]; } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: room_verb["name"], args: room_args, cmd: cmd }; } if (!str_starts(text, "/")) { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [text], cmd: cmd }; } return this:huh_plan(text, "I don't see " + argstr + "."); }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { let plan = this:command_plan(text); if (!plan["ok"] || plan["route"] != "direct") { return plan; } set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return dispatch(plan["target"], plan["verb"], plan["args"]); }

seed_hooks.name: Living Room
seed_hooks.description: A bright, open living room with a rough fireplace, bookcases on two walls, and broad windows looking south. A sliding glass door leads southeast onto a wooden deck.

seed_hooks.name: Deck
seed_hooks.description: A wooden deck behind the house, facing south across the pool toward the gardens. The living room is west through the glass door, and a large hot tub waits at the east end.

seed_hooks.name: Hot Tub
seed_hooks.description: A molded hot tub with a bench around three sides and bubbling jets running.

seed_hooks.name: southeast
seed_hooks.description: Sliding glass door leading from the living room onto the deck.

seed_hooks.name: south
seed_hooks.description: Tempting plate-glass windows on the south wall. They are not a real way out.

properties.nogo_msg: Surely you don't really want to try walking through the plate-glass windows, especially with a sliding glass door nearby.
properties.onogo_msg: attempts to walk through the plate-glass windows. Fortunately, they're tougher than that.

seed_hooks.name: west
seed_hooks.description: The sliding glass door back into the living room.

seed_hooks.name: east
seed_hooks.description: The raised hot tub area at the east end of the deck.

properties.leave_msg: You enter the soothing waters of the hot tub.

seed_hooks.name: west
seed_hooks.description: The way back out to the deck.

properties.oleave_msg: gets out of the hot tub.

seed_hooks.name: Couch
seed_hooks.description: A low couch with worn cushions facing the mantelpiece. It is comfortable enough to sit on, but too large to carry.

seed_hooks.name: Brass Lamp
seed_hooks.description: A small brass lamp with a warm shade. It is light enough to carry from room to room.

seed_hooks.name: Deck Towel
seed_hooks.description: A striped towel folded over the deck rail, dry for now and ready to be taken along.

seed_hooks.name: Mug
seed_hooks.description: A heavy ceramic mug with the last smell of coffee in it.

seed_hooks.name: Cockatoo
seed_hooks.description: A sulphur-crested cockatoo sitting in a cage on top of the mantelpiece. Inside the cage are a few bird-toys, a mirror, and a tray for its food and water.
